name: salesforce
description: Work with Salesforce CRM data from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Work with Salesforce CRM data from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Work with Salesforce CRM data in Codex. Search and inspect CRM records such as accounts, contacts, leads, and opportunities, and make updates when your workspace and Salesforce permissions allow it.
defaultPrompt: Find the latest Salesforce context for this account
